completed_tasks.name: Show removable execution readiness in Qt

remaining_tasks.name: Choose the next narrow 0.1 slice: Qt publish ergonomics or CLI/service-side execution hardening
Keep real SSH transfer, remote deletion execution, credential unlock, remote verification, audio device enumeration, playback, and installed activation deferred
Do not test OS loading yet; no bootable image, installer, compositor session, or installed service activation path is ready

decisions.decision: Continue with small local Qt/CLI/service slices before installed services, packaging, SSH publication, remote verification, or audio device enumeration.
decisions.rationale: This keeps the version 0.1 local-first workflow inspectable and aligned with the Phase 0 architecture baseline.

decisions.decision: The Qt Publish pane may show removable execution readiness, but still must not execute transfers from the UI.
decisions.rationale: The current UI slice is read-only and preserves the explicit confirmation boundary around publish destination mutation.

next_action: Read .planning/.continue-here.md, docs/development/CHECKPOINT.md, and docs/development/PHASE-0-0.1-ALIGNMENT.md, then propose the next narrow 0.1 slice: Qt publish ergonomics or CLI/service-side execution hardening.
context_notes: Paused after commit 68284db. No blockers, human actions, background processes, async jobs, OS image, installer, installed activation, or boot/loading path are pending.
